title: The One With The Cheap Wedding Dress

lines.text: Central Perk, Monica, Chandler, Phoebe, and Joey are there. Monica is holding a piece of paper.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: So the wedding caterer sent me this list of twelve appetizers and I have to narrow it down to six.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Food? Uh-huh gimme! (She hands him the paper.)

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: So did Monica tell you about this great band called the Swing Kings that we're trying to get to play at the wedding?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Since when are you into swing music?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Oh since forever! I used to go all over town listening to bands!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Chandler.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Gap commercial. (To Monica) So did you book them? Did you call?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: I will.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Do you want me to call?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: No, I'll do it. You just stick to your job.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: What is your job?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Staying out of the way.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: This is impossible Monica, why don't you just pick all 15? (Hands back the paper.)

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: There were only twelve.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Oh yeah, I added three.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: What are peanut butter fingers?!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Oh yeah... (He mimes sticking his fingers into a jar of peanut butter, scooping some out, and eating it off his fingers.)
Opening Credits
A Street, Chandler and Ross are at a newsstand.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: (noticing a beautiful woman moving in down the street) Well hello! She's cute! Should we uh, go try to talk to her?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Sure! That's one of the great things about being engaged. I'm not nervous talking to pretty girls anymore.

lines.speaker: The Woman
lines.text: Could you guys help me? (Chandler shyly exhales and looks away.)

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Uh yeah! Let me, let me get that for you.

lines.speaker: The Woman
lines.text: It-it's really heavy.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: (exhales) I got it. (He lifts the box and grunts under the strain.) (Calmly) So hi, I'm uh, I'm Ross and this is my friend Chandler. (He shyly waves.)

lines.speaker: The Woman
lines.text: I-I am Kristen.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Kristen, hi. Are you uh, new to the area, 'cause if you are...I'd love to show you around sometime.

lines.speaker: Kristen
lines.text: I...I uh, actually just moved from four blocks over.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Ah.

lines.speaker: Kristen
lines.text: But-but this block is like a whole other world.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Y'know actually it does have a very interesting history. Uh, this street is the first street in the city to have an underground sewer system. (Kristen crinkles her nose at that.) Before that sewage and waste would just flow right down the street. Yeah, sometimes ankle deep! (He stops when he realizes what he's talking about.)

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: (To Ross) Smooth.

lines.speaker: Kristen
lines.text: (To Chandler) Excuse me? (Chandler does the shy thing again.)

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Umm, say you're gonna be starving after all this moving. What do you say I take you to dinner tonight?

lines.speaker: Kristen
lines.text: Oh I'd like that.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Yeah?

lines.speaker: Kristen
lines.text: Yeah.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Great! Uh, let me take this up for you. (The box he's holding.)

lines.speaker: Kristen
lines.text: After you.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Oh no-no, after you. (She grabs a chair and heads upstairs.) (When she's gone.) Oh my God! (He drops the box and Chandler can't pick it up.)
A Bridal Shop, Phoebe and Rachel are waiting for Monica who is trying on her wedding dress.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: (wearing a veil) Am I crazy or does this totally go?!
Monica enters from the dressing room wearing her gown.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Oh my God! You look so beautiful!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: (To Rachel) Thank you Rachel but, look at Monica!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: This is it. Yeah, this is the one. I can't believe I found it!
Another woman walks up.

lines.speaker: The Woman
lines.text: Wow you look so beautiful! If I knew you, I'd cry.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Well I'm Monica Geller, ball like a baby.

lines.speaker: The Woman
lines.text: I'm Megan Bailey.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Have you found your dress yet?

lines.speaker: Megan
lines.text: Oh no, these dresses are all so amazing but there is no way I could afford one.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: No, I can't afford this either. No. I-I-I'm, I'm just to figure out which one I want then I'm gonna get it at Kleinman's, this discount place in Brooklyn, day after tomorrow they are having a huge sale.

lines.speaker: Megan
lines.text: Oh, thanks for the tip.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Yeah! So-so when are you getting married?

lines.speaker: Megan
lines.text: Oh I'm not, I just like to try these on.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: I do the same thing.

lines.speaker: Megan
lines.text: I'm just kidding. I'm getting married July 25th.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: I'm just kidding too. (Laughs) I'm getting married in December. (Turns away not happy with herself.)

lines.speaker: Megan
lines.text: (To Monica) So when are you getting married?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Oh May 15th.

lines.speaker: Megan
lines.text: Oooh it's getting close!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Yeah!

lines.speaker: Megan
lines.text: So uh, who's your photographer?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Jeffery.

lines.speaker: Megan
lines.text: We met with him. Did he show you the photos of the nude wedding he did?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: The best man? Wow!

lines.speaker: Megan
lines.text: I know! I almost called off my wedding. Oh, who's your band?!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Oh, my fiancee wants the Swing Kings.

lines.speaker: Megan
lines.text: Oh, you're so lucky. My fiancee wants the heavy metal band Carcass.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Ooh, is that spelled with a 'C' or a 'K'? Oh my God! It doesn't matter; they're both great!
Another woman walks past Rachel carrying a wedding dress.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Oh y'know what? Y'know what? Now that you know what you want you should go to Kleinman's and get it half off. This place is so overpriced.

lines.speaker: The Woman
lines.text: I own this store.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: So, does this (The dress) come in another color or... (The store owner walks away.)
A Street, Joey is walking by Kristen who is still moving in.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: (checking her out) Hi! You uh, movin' in or movin' out?

lines.speaker: Kristen
lines.text: I'm moving in.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Oh uh, can I give you a hand?

lines.speaker: Kristen
lines.text: Oh okay. But y'know what? Be careful. Because a guy was helping me before had to leave because he hurt his back.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Boyfriend?

lines.speaker: Kristen
lines.text: No.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: I'm Joey. (They shake hands.)

lines.speaker: Kristen
lines.text: Kristen.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Oh wow, what a beautiful name! (Pause) What is it again?

lines.speaker: Kristen
lines.text: Kristen.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Got it! (He picks up a lamp.) So...

lines.speaker: Kristen
lines.text: So uh, do you live around here?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Yeah! Yeah! Right down there. (Points.) Hey listen; let me give you a little tip. Do not take a nap on this stoop (Points to hers) or you can wake up with your shoes gone.

lines.speaker: Kristen
lines.text: I'll remember that.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Okay. Yeah. Listen would you uh, would you like to have dinner with me tonight?

lines.speaker: Kristen
lines.text: Oh I, I have plans tonight.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Oh.

lines.speaker: Kristen
lines.text: But how about tomorrow?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Sounds great! Okay all right, well where does this go? (The lamp he's holding.)

lines.speaker: Kristen
lines.text: You look strong, why don't I take that and you grab one of the boxes.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Okay. Yeah. (She leaves and he goes to pick up a box marked books, but decides to take the box marked pillows instead.) Yeah, I'll grab this one. (He follows her upstairs.)
Kleinman's, a horde of women including Rachel, Phoebe, and Monica are waiting for the store to open.

lines.speaker: A Woman
lines.text: What is taking so long?! I mean whatever!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: (To Phoebe) So this is Brooklyn.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: All right, listen up. There is usually only one dress in each size so when they open those doors, fan out. Now, this is what you're looking for! (Holds up a picture of it.) Memorize it! When you locate the dress, blow on these. All right? (She passes out whistles to them.) Three short blasts, when you hear it. Come running.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Okay.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Got it.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: All right.
A worker comes to open the door and the horde starts to press forward.

lines.speaker: A Woman
lines.text: Here he comes! Hurry!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Oh they're pushing! They're pushing!!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: (To Rachel) Hey! Don't be a baby!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Well I...
The door opens allowing the horde to charge in, knocking Rachel out of the way and to the ground.

lines.speaker: A Woman
lines.text: Let's go!!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: (coming back out) Hey! Rachel! Come on!!!!
[Time lapse, inside the store, Monica is frantically looking for her dress.]

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: No. No. Not it. Not it. Not it. (Checks another rack and another woman tries to reach around her.) (To the woman) Don't crowd me! (Finds it) This is it! This is the dress! Oh my God, it's perfect! (She takes it off of the rack and someone has a hold of it on the other side of the rack and tugs on it.) I'm sorry, this one's taken! (The other woman tugs harder pulling Monica through the rack.) Whoa!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Megan!

lines.speaker: Megan
lines.text: Monica!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: You came?!

lines.speaker: Megan
lines.text: Yeah!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: This is my dress!

lines.speaker: Megan
lines.text: No!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Yes it is! You saw me wearing it!

lines.speaker: Megan
lines.text: And now you'll see me buying it.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: What? You freak! You wouldn't even have known about this place if it wasn't for me!

lines.speaker: Megan
lines.text: Look, you don't want to fight me.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Maybe I do! I'm pretty feisty! (She blows the signal.)
[Cut to Phoebe in another part of the store.]

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: (hearing the signal) I'm coming! I'm coming! (She takes off towards the signal and almost knocks another woman over.)

lines.speaker: Woman
lines.text: Hey!
She hears another signal in another direction.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Okay! (Runs that way and hears another whistle blast.) Hey! (Heads the other way and hears another blast.) What do I do?!! (She runs in the second direction and finds that the whistling is coming from inside a rack. She moves the dresses out of the way to find Rachel curled up in a fetal position frantically blowing on the whistle.) What are you doing? (Rachel doesn't stop.) Did you find the dress? (Rachel won't stop so Phoebe pinches her nose shut which causes her to spit the whistle out.)

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Did you find the dress?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: No! You gotta get me out of here Phoebe! These bargain shoppers are crazy!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: I-We gotta get Monica. (She starts to leave.)

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: No! You gotta hold my hand!!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Oh my God!! (She grabs Rachel's hand and drags her towards Monica.) Excuse me! Excuse me! (She's knocking women and veils out of the way as she moves.)
She gets to Monica who has the dress balled up in one hand and is sitting on Megan who is sprawled out on the floor.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: (handing Phoebe the dress) Go! Go! Go!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: (seeing who's trapped) Hey...

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: NOW!!!!!!!! (Rachel runs off and Monica gets up to follow her.)
Central Perk, Chandler and Ross are there.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: So Ross, how was your date the other night? Did you tell her about the magical ride that starts with the flush of every toilet?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Laugh all you want but uh, she actually left me a message saying she'd like to go out again.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Huh.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Yeah in fact, I'm gonna go call her right now. And I'll make sure to tell her my friend Chandler says... (He mimics the shy reaction Chandler did.)

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: (entering) Hey Chandler!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Hey!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Listen, sorry I didn't stop by last night but I had a date.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Uh Joe, when it's one o'clock in the morning and you don't come by? That's okay!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Well check it out, I was with this really hot girl who just moved in right across the street!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Really? Right across the street?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Yeah!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: When'd you meet her?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Two days ago.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Excellent! Y'know Ross met somebody too!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Oh yeah?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: (returning) Hey.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Hi! How'd it go?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Oh great! We're going out again Saturday. But I just found she's also seeing some other guy.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: (sarcastically shocked) Really?! Joe? What would you do if you were in Ross's situation?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Well, I sorta am. I mean yeah, I'm dating this girl who's also seeing another guy. But, I don't know, I'm not to worried about it.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Well you shouldn't be. Believe me I wouldn't want to be the guy who's up against you. (Chandler laughs.) I mean that doofus is going to lose!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: So this is nice! I wish I didn't have to go, believe me! But unfortunately I have to. (He gets up and Joey moves over next to Ross.) Oh uh, by the way, what's the name the girl you're dating?

lines.speaker: Joey and Ross
lines.text: Kristen Lang.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Bye! (Exits.)
Commercial Break
Central Perk, time lapse from the earlier scene.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Well obviously only one of us can keep dating her.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Obviously! So, how do we decide?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Well now let's-let's look at this objectively, I think I should date her...

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: (not buying it) Uh-huh. Uh-huh. Or, or I'm the one who dates her.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: That's interesting, but check this out. I date her...

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Yeah-yeah I like that but just to go in another direction...

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Okay, okay. This can go on for a while.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Yeah well we should order some food then.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: No Joey! Look why don't, why don't we just let her decide? Okay? Hey-hey, we'll each go out with her one more time. And-and we'll see who she likes best.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: (smiling) That sounds fair.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Maybe I'll take her to that new French restaurant down the street...

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Ah yeah-wait a second now! Look we're gonna have to set a spending limit on the date. I don't have the money to take her to a fancy place like that.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Well sorry, that's what I do on dates.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: All right, well I guess I'll just have to do what I do on dates.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: So let's decide on the spending limit...

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Yeah. Uh, (thinks)...a slice...(Thinks)...six dollars?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: I was thinking more like a hundred.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Okay. Can I borrow 94 dollars?
Monica and Chandler's, Monica, Phoebe, and Rachel are admiring Monica's wedding dress.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Oh...

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: I know. Hand me a tissue. (Monica hands her one.)
Rachel goes to the fridge, opens it, and blows on the whistle Monica gave her at the store, which causes Phoebe and Monica to turn around and look at her.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: You're out of Diet Coke.
The phone rings and Monica answers it as Rachel goes into the bathroom.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Hello? (Listens) What?! (Listens) You what?! (Listens) Hey you listen here missy! (Listens) Wh-(She is hung up on.)

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: What?!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: That was that girl Megan! She booked the Swing Kings on the day of our wedding and said that I couldn't have them back unless I gave her the dress!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: (gasps) Does that mean Carcass is available?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: What am I gonna do?! That is the dress! That is the dress! Wh...Chandler wants the band. What do I do?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Well just figure out a way to talk him out of it.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: How?
There are three short whistle blasts from the bathroom.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: You're out of toilet paper!
Ross's apartment, Ross is getting ready for his date with Kristen.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: (entering) Hey!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Hey! What's up?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: I just wanted to come by and y'know, wish you good luck on your date.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Oh thanks!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Yeah. What time are you meeting her?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: We have 8:00 reservations at Grammercy Bistero.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Wow, that's in like 20 minutes. You'd better get dressed.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: I am dressed.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Oh. Well good! (To himself) For me. (He picks up a jar of lotion.) What is this? Did you give yourself a facial?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: I have an oily T-zone!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Okay dude! (Finds a receit.) Hey you uh, you sent Kristen flowers.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: That's right.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: You spent a hundred dollars. That's the limit. You're screwed!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Uh actually, I sent the flowers before the actual date. So techincally, technically I didn't break any rules. Thanks for stopping by though.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Oh-oh! So that's the way it's gonna be huh? Yeah I can break the rules too y'know!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Oh yeah? What are you gonna do?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: I don't know.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Why am I not surprised?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Y'know what Ross? I'm not gonna let you get away with this!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: I don't think you have much choice.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Well we'll see!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Bye-bye!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Yeah bye-bye! (Exits and comes back in still holding the lotion.) Hey! So just a light layer?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Yes. Yes. Just here (Runs his fingers down the bridge of his nose) and there (Runs his fingers across his forehead).
Monica and Chandler's, Chandler is entering without touching anything with his hands. Phoebe, Monica, and Rachel are there.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Joey got meat sauce on the banister again! (He goes into the bathroom to wash his hands.)

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Yeah, swing music is so out.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Phoebe, he's gotta be in the room for that to work.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: (returning) What are you guys talking about?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Well umm, we were just talking about the y'know, the Swing Kings and just wondering whether y'know, they were the right way to go.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Yeah, I went to a wedding once where they had swing music and uh, two months later the couple got divorced. And now I'm not saying that there's any connection here y'know, but they did tell me that's why they got divorced.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: But I love swing music!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Yeah but the Swing Kings? Y'know they suck so much that people actually die at their concerts-They just stop living.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Look all I know is when Monica and I went to see them, we had fun! And there's another reason too.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Well, what is the other reason?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: I don't want to say.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Well you have to because maybe it's stupid.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Well it's just while Monica and I were dancing to them it was...the first time I knew that...you were the woman I wanted to dance all my dances with.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Oh crap!
Grammercy Bistero, Ross and Kristen are waiting for their table to be ready. Ross is returning from talking to the matire'd.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: So they said our table will be ready in just a few minutes.

lines.speaker: Kristen
lines.text: Oh great!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Yeah.

lines.speaker: Kristen
lines.text: Is your back feeling better?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Oh yeah it's fine. I guess the more muscles you have the more they can spasim out of control.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: (entering) Kristen?

lines.speaker: Kristen
lines.text: Joey!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Hi!

lines.speaker: Kristen
lines.text: Hi! What are you doing here?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Oh I like this place. And technically, technically I'm not breaking any rules so I...

lines.speaker: Kristen
lines.text: Well uh, Ross? This is Joey. Joey? Ross.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Hi!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Hi. (They shake hands.) It's nice to meet you. I used to have a friend named Joey. I don't anymore.

lines.speaker: Kristen
lines.text: Our table will be ready in a couple minutes.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Yeah. So...

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Sure! I would love to wait with you guys! Thanks! (Sits down.)

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: So Joey umm, you look familiar. Are uh, are you on TV or something?

lines.speaker: Kristen
lines.text: Well Joey doesn't like to talk about it but, he's one of the stars of Days Of Our Lives.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: That's right! That's right, don't you play a woman?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: A woman in a man's body.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Much better.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: So y'know Ross it's funny 'cause, you look familiar to me too. Have you ever been married?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Well yes, yes I have. In fact umm, just the other day Kristen and I were talking about how I've been married and how I have a son.

lines.speaker: Kristen
lines.text: Yeah, little Eric.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: That's right! Wait no, Ben.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: So you've just married the one time then?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Well umm...

lines.speaker: Kristen
lines.text: You've been married twice?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Yes. And another time after that. Boy I'm getting hungry! Hey Joey, have you ever been so hungry on a date that when a girl goes to the bathroom you eat some of her food?

lines.speaker: Kristen
lines.text: You said the waiter ate my crab cake.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: (laughs that one off) Yeah. So uh Ross, well now-why did that first marriage breakup? Was it because the woman was straight or she was a lesbian?

lines.speaker: Kristen
lines.text: Do you two know each other?

lines.speaker: Joey and Ross
lines.text: No. No.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: No. It just seems like Ross is the kind of a guy that would marry a woman on the verge of being a lesbian and then push her over the edge.
Kristen is not enjoying this.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Wait a minute! Were you on a poster for gonorrhea?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Have you ever slept in the same bed as a monkey?!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Hey you leave Marcel out of this!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Fine! Have you ever got stuck in a pair of your own leather pants?!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Hey-hey have you ever locked yourself in a TV cabinet VD boy?!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Monkey lover!
They both notice that Kristen has left.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: When do you think we lost her?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Probably around gonorrhea.
Monica and Chandler's, Chandler is entering.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Hi, honey! I'm home!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: (from the bedroom) Don't come in here!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Why? Do you another boyfriend in there or something?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: No! We only mess around at his place!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Y'know it's funny I started it but, now it's scary me. So could you come out here please?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: No, I'm wearing a wedding dress.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Oh you got a wedding dress? That's great!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Yeah but I'm not keeping it.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Well then why can't I see it?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Oh. I guess you can. Okay but; I-I have to return it, so you can't like it.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Okay I promise. I'll-I'll hate it. (She enters.) Wow! You-you look...hideous.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Really?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Yeah, that's like the most ugliest dress I've ever seen. Wh-why do you to return it?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Oh because it doesn't...really fit. Oh by the way, I-I booked the Swing Kings.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Oh that's great! Great! Thanks! But that dress I mean it's like yuck! It's terrible! It makes me wanna just rip it right off of you!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Okay! But you can't rip it. Well, maybe a little.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Okay!
Ending Credits
Monica and Chandler's, Chandler, Joey, and Ross are watching a basketball game on the couch.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: (entering) Hey guys! Do you wanna look at the song list for the wedding? (They ignore her.) Guys?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: (without turning around) I thought you were gonna be gone all day.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: All right? What's going on?
They all slowly turn around to reveal that they are giving themselves a facial.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: I'm sorry. I'm sorry. I-I should probably leave you girls alone. (She heads for the bedroom.)

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Yeah, laugh all you want but in ten minutes we're gonna have younger looking skin!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Yeah! (Monica goes in the bedroom.) Y'know, she could use a little...(Whistles that she needs to do what they're doing.) (Something happens on the game.) Oh nice shot!!! (They all cheer.)
End
